title: desmodium discolor var. villosum
intro: Desmodium discolor var. villosum, also known as vellozo's tick trefoil or vellozo's tick clover, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its hairy and twining stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Desmodium discolor var. villosum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in folk medicine to treat various health issues.
